title: BroadcastBox session record extension
description: Fields the broadcast-box module contributes to `session` records via its manifest `capabilities.schemaExtensions: ["session"]`. STAGING LOCATION: this is the canonical draft; in Phase 5 it relocates verbatim to `modules/broadcast-box/schemas/record-schema-extension.json` (where ModuleResolver loads it). Capture/schedule provenance for meetings captured by a BroadcastBox appliance. NOTE: `visibility` and `minutes_status` are CORE session fields (record-type-schemas/session-schema.json), not here; the A/V blob itself is an `attached_files[]` entry on the record (UUID storage), referenced by `capture.av_file`.

device.description: Enrolled BroadcastBox device id that produced the recording.

av_file.description: Storage UUID of the recorded A/V, stored as an attached_files[] entry.

segments.description: Time segments enabling per-segment visibility (e.g. an in-camera portion within an otherwise public meeting).

visibility.description: Whether this segment is published. in_camera segments are excluded from publication and livestream.

schedule.description: Pre-meeting scheduling pushed to the assigned device so it can capture autonomously even without connectivity.

assigned_device.description: Enrolled device id assigned to capture this session.

transcript_status.description: Verification state of the AI transcript. 'automated' = unverified (display labeled, A/V is authoritative); 'reviewed' = a clerk has checked it.
